author: @paigenootbaar44

title: MORNING IN MY LIFE AT THE UNIVERSITY OF ALABAMA | friday morning vlog
body: For everyone saying she is a kid of a rich family. She runs all of her social media platforms alone which make you gain a lot of money. Her BMW is a hand me down from her mom from 2010. Most of her skincare is PR. She does really nice videos about all of the unboxing and that is where most of her skincare and make up is from. In her Amazon storefront you can see some of the things that she used to decorate her room and they do not cost an insane amount of money. I think we should be happy for her and also appreciate the things that we have in life, without looking so much into others people life and choosing either to say if the person grew up rich or poor.

author: @brownwoodjohn

title: A day in the life of an electrical engineering student
body:
I was an aerospace engineer (BS, MS AE) for 40 years, recently retired. I understand exactly how you feel, an engineering degree takes ALOT of mental stamina, more than most non engineers realize, I can remember wanting to quit many times. My advice to you is DON’T QUIT!! Engineering is a GREAT career field, right now a whole generation of baby boomer engineers are retiring and the opportunities are tremendous (especially for an electrical engineer). Take a SHORT break if you need too, but then get back up on the horse, you won’t be sorry!! Much RESPECT!!
😊❤
author: @boxorfurnace

title: A day in the life of an electrical engineering student
body:
I remember my engineering student days. I am now a graduate of Electrical Engineering, now reviewing for My REE Board Exam this August, please pray for me! God bless you all! ❤️

We can do this! We will be successful licensed engineers!

title: A day in the life of an electrical engineering student
body: I've been there. Multiple times I've contemplated switching to business admin or finance but I stuck to EE, persevered and graduated in 6 years lol.  Worked for several employers and went back to school for more mental anguish and pain and earned my MSEE.  You can do it, don't give up!

author: @luisserrano294

title: A day in the life of an electrical engineering student
body: The Title says "Electrical" but they have a picture of a pcb with what looks like a microprocessor hidden behind the little patch of words and that's not Electrical, it is Electronics.  I have been a Power Electronics Engineer for the past 50 or more years.  I love it.  I enjoyed every day I went to work.  Yeah, classes were hard and we really had to make it our lifes work.  BUT... 4 years go quickly.  There was a time that each day on my way to work, I thought, "what is todays adventure going to be".  I cant get there fast enough to enjoy myself.  So Rachel Brownell put your heart into it and you will succeed. The rewards waiting for you are tremendous.
author: @ferrariguy4396

title: A day in the life of an electrical engineering student
body: I don’t how I made it but when I was hired and working it’s really understanding the theories and application.  Persevere and you will get there  in time! It took me a while though lol 😂😂😂
